Book a stand
Free registration

Visit the heart of innovation of the dental industry

DENTEX Algeria is the unmissable event for any member of the dental sector looking to move their company forward. Meet, learn and discuss new ideas through an array of show features that will engage, educate, entertain and inspire you!

  • Discover innovative products & services such as; Implants, dental chairs, dental imaging, CAD/CAM technology and instruments.
  • See, feel, and use the products up close. Discuss their attributes in detail with their manufacturers face-to-face before you make a decision.
  • Discover the latest hot trends and opportunities with FREE access to a high-level conference programme.
Inscription visiteurs

This event is subject to a strict age limit, anyone under the age of 16 will be refused access to the exhibition
